mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyPtcpDAO.srvyPtcpntSelect 설 명 : 설문참여자조회 */ SELECT NVL((SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT WHERE ORG_ID = USR.ORG_ID AND DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID),'-') AS DEPTNM , NVL(USR.STDNT_NO,'-') AS STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , USR.USER_ID , NVL(PTCP.PTCP_EVL_SCR, 0) AS PTCP_EVL_SCR , PTCP.SRVY_PTCP_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER USR LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP ON USR.USER_ID = PTCP.USER_ID AND PTCP.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} WHERE USR.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : SrvyPtcpDAO.profMemoSelect 설 명 : 교수메모조회 */ SELECT #{srvyPtcpId} AS SRVY_PTCP_ID , #{userId} AS USER_ID , (SELECT PROF_MEMO FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP WHERE SRVY_PTCP_ID = #{srvyPtcpId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}) AS PROF_MEMO FROM DUAL
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SrvyPtcpDAO.profMemoModify 설 명 : 교수메모수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP SRVY_PTCP USING ( SELECT #{srvyPtcpId} AS SRVY_PTCP_ID , #{srvyId} AS SRVY_ID , #{userId} AS USER_ID , #{profMemo} AS PROF_MEMO , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID FROM DUAL ) USR ON ( SRVY_PTCP.SRVY_PTCP_ID = USR.SRVY_PTCP_ID AND SRVY_PTCP.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SRVY_PTCP.PROF_MEMO = USR.PROF_MEMO , SRVY_PTCP.MDFR_ID = USR.RGTR_ID , SRVY_PTCP.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SRVY_PTCP_ID , SRVY_ID , USER_ID , PROF_MEMO , PTCP_EVL_SCR , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( USR.SRVY_PTCP_ID , USR.SRVY_ID , USR.USER_ID , USR.PROF_MEMO , 0 , USR.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyPtcpDAO.srvyPtcpDvcStatusList 설 명 : 설문참여장치별현황목록 */ SELECT CMMN_CD.CD , CMMN_CD.CDNM , COUNT(PTCP.USER_ID) AS srvyPtcpCnt FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN_CD LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP ON CMMN_CD.CD = PTCP.CNTN_DVC_TYCD AND PTCP.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY ON PTCP.SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID AND SRVY.DELYN = 'N' AND SRVY.USEYN = 'Y' AND SRVY.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SBJCT_USER ON PTCP.USER_ID = SBJCT_USER.USER_ID WHERE CMMN_CD.UP_CD = 'CNTN_DVC_TYCD' AND CMMN_CD.USEYN = 'Y' AND CMMN_CD.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CMMN_CD.CD_SEQNO > 0 GROUP BY CMMN_CD.CD, CMMN_CD.CDNM, CMMN_CD.CD_SEQNO ORDER BY CMMN_CD.CD_SEQNO

/* SQL ID : SrvyPtcpDAO.srvyPtcpCntSelect 설 명 : 설문참여수조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SELECT COUNT(PTCP.USER_ID) AS PTCP_CNT , CASE WHEN SRVY.UP_SRVY_ID IS NULL THEN (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM SBJCT_USER) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(TEAM_MBR.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM TEAM ON TEAM.TEAM_ID = TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID AND TEAM.TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_TRGT SRVY_TRGT ON TEAM.TEAM_ID = SRVY_TRGT.TEAM_ID WHERE SRVY_TRGT.SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID ) END AS TOTAL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP ON PTCP.SRVY_ID = SRVY.SRVY_ID AND PTCP.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER) AND PTCP.PTCP_DTTM IS NOT NULL WHERE SRVY.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND SRVY.DELYN = 'N' AND SRVY.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY SRVY.SRVY_ID, SRVY.UP_SRVY_ID
